sglang.title: feat(engine): add bootstrap parameters to generate methods (dynamo)
sglang.author: ishandhanani

Motivation
In order to run PD Disaggregation, I noticed that you must use the provided mini load-balancer for worker discovery. In this loadbalancer - we add the bootstrap server parameters to the request and then send it to the /generate endpoint for inference.
I wanted to avoid using the mini_lb.p

There are two issues with our 8-gpu test:

The workflow name was incorrect. It was unit-test-backend-8-gpu but handles several accuracy tests.

vllm.title: Add NeuronxDistributedInference support, Speculative Decoding, Dynamic on-device sampling
vllm.author: aws-satyajith
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add the following Neuron features as a part of RFC #15970 :


NeuronX Distributed (NxD) Inference Support

Allow customers to select a framework based on preference or availability. Default to neuronx-distributed-inference (NxD); if unavailable, fall back to transformers-neuronx (TNx).
Support infer

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add missing chat templates for various MLLMs
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When developing #17361, I found that several multi-modal models don't have chat templates, so I added them in this PR.
Unlike language models, multi-modal models can't fall back to Completions API, so it's necessary to provide a chat template even for non-chat models in order to use them for online

vllm.title: Fix test_memory_usage_no_spec
vllm.author: shinoss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
pytest tests/spec_decode/test_memory_usage.py

test failing before, passing now

vllm.title: Make key optional for rotary embedding
vllm.author: shinoss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Make key an optional argument for rotary embedding. This flexibility may be needed in cross-layer KV sharing, e.g. Layer-Condensed KV Cache and Cross-Layer Attention, where there is no K to apply rotary embedding on.
Unit tested with:
pytest tests/kernels/core/test_rotary_embedding.py
pytest tests/k

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
update fp8 link with int8 and int 4
and the page already mentioned repo link, also in the troubleshoot section, so update the link to issue directly.

vllm.title: [ROCm][FP8][Kernel] FP8 quantization fused into Custom Paged Attention
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
An option to apply fp8 output scale in ROCm custom paged attention and output FP8 tensor
In case a non-None scale tensor is passed to the kernel, the output tensor is expected to be in the current_platform.fp8_dtype() type (float8_fnuz or float8_fn), and the scale is applied to it before storing int

vllm.title: Only depend on importlib-metadata for Python < 3.10
vllm.author: tiran
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The stdlib module importlib.metadata replaces the PyPI package importlib-metadata since Python 3.10. The function vllm.plugins.load_plugins_by_group() is the only place that imports importlib_metadata. The import is conditional for sys.version_info < (3, 10).

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Video IO error for short video
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #17775 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)

Fix missing num_frames update for OpenCV video IO backend
Add video tests for media IO.

vllm.title: Fix and simplify `deprecated=True` CLI `kwarg`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fixes error seen on main

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix missing lora name mapping for lora without prefix
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix missing weights_mapper._map_name for LoRA that doesn't have base_model.model. prefix.

vllm.title: [Quantization] Quark MXFP4 format loading
vllm.author: BowenBao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Initial PR to integrate loading MXFP4 models quantized by Quark.
This PR supports running MXFP4 emulation for devices where micro-scaling datatype is not natively supported.
Next Steps

MoE MXFP4 support.
Faster emulation.
Triton kernel integration.

vllm.title: [Hardware][TPU][V1] Multi-LoRA implementation for the V1 TPU backend
vllm.author: Akshat-Tripathi
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds a Multi-LoRA implementation that works on the TPU backend, extending the work done in #11100, and supercedes #12623. It has a functional but unoptimised Pallas kernel implementation for the bgmv kernel.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Avoid secondary missing `MultiprocExecutor.workers` error
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
If V1 MultiprocExecutor fails during startup before the workers field has been set it will result in secondary confusing exception: AttributeError: 'MultiprocExecutor' object has no attribute 'workers'.
As reported in #17756 and #17533.

vllm.title: [Core][Feature] Input metadata dump on crash
vllm.author: wallashss
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds a feature to dump input metadata when vllm engine crashes. In essence, this change is the spiritual successor to #8305 that was recently removed in #12582. However, I tried to solve it differently, since this feature can give us more hints to help debug crashes in production environment

vllm.title: [Chore][Doc] uses model id determined from OpenAI client
vllm.author: aarnphm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR cleanups the model id for some structured outputs examples
where before it was hard coded. This PR will determine this model id
from clien such that it will work based on the models users tests with vllm serve
Signed-off-by: Aaron Pham contact@aarnphm.xyz

vllm.title: Don't call the venv `vllm`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Calling your virtual environment vllm when it is created in your pwd, as it is with uv venv, will definitely lead to mysterious import errors.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix `--disable-log-stats` in V1 server mode
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Also sum gpu blocks across DP ranks when reporting the num_gpu_blocks metric.
Both introduced by #15755
There is a test for this but it's not running on V1 yet. Will look at changing that: https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/main/tests/metrics/test_metrics.py

vllm.title: [Core] Support full cuda graph in v1
vllm.author: chanh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Support capturing a single CUDA graph for the entire model's forward pass, instead of piecewise graphs. This requires creating persistent buffers to make attention graphable. Credit to @tlrmchlsmth for the original implementation.
Limitations:

This only works with V1 + FA3, since FA2 curren

vllm.title: Improve exception reporting in MP engine
vllm.author: vmarkovtsev
vllm.bodyExcerpt: "raise e from None" means changing the error bubble narrative from "another exception caused by e" to "exception e was raised and we forward it up"

vllm.title: [Installation] OpenTelemetry version update
vllm.author: Xarbirus
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
These changes relax the OpenTelemetry version requirements, allowing newer packages to be used and reducing version conflicts.
FIX #17174

vllm.author: amd-hhashemi

vllm.title: [Hardware][Power] Enable compressed tensor W8A8 INT8 quantization for POWER
vllm.author: Akashcodes732
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for compressed tensor W8A8 INT8 quantization on POWER architecture using oneDNN.
Key changes include:

Architecture-specific enablement for POWER
Ensured compatibility with existing INT8 code paths
Verified functionality with static and dynamic quantized models on POWER10

vllm.title: [Hardware][Intel-Gaudi] Support Automatic Prefix Caching on HPU
vllm.author: adobrzyn
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Added support for Automatic Prefix Caching for HPU/Gaudi. Disabled by default, might be turned on with enable_prefix_caching=True (in code) / --enable-prefix-caching (server spawning)

vllm.title: [Frontend] Chat template fallbacks for multimodal models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since multi-modal models must use Chat Completions API, for user convenience I have added automatic fallbacks for supported multi-modal models. These fallbacks are used when no default chat template is available and the user did not input one. They are located inside a new module vllm.transformers_u

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix bad words for Mistral models
vllm.author: qionghuang6
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When using the bad_words SamplingParam with Mistral models with V1, bad_words compiles incorrectly.
For example, when bad_words=["the"] _bad_words_token_ids is [[1, 3265]] when it should be [[3265]], so the word "the" is never matched.
We fix this by setting add_special_tokens=False for all tokenize
